title: clinelymus coreanus
intro: Clinelymus coreanus, also known as the Chinese milkvetch, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Clinelymus coreanus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Clinically, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
